resources.string: This device\'s origin is the Ableton Converter. It is not interactable and only used for simulating Abletons Arpeggiator.
This device\'s origin is the Ableton Converter. It is not interactable and only used for simulating Abletons Pitcher.
Optional. If set, lights chain will be sourced from the Apollo project instead of Ableton MIDI tracks.
Choose an optional custom palette before converting your Live set into an Amethyst workspace.
Optional. If omitted, the default Novation palette is used.
Import lighting data from a companion Apollo project file.
Configure optional settings for your Ableton Live-Set import. Both fields are optional.
Override the default colour mapping with a custom palette file.
Home is not available on iOS yet.
This may take a moment for larger projects.
Update the project details shown for this workspace.
This is the title that will be shown in your workspace and recent projects.
Set up the basics for a fresh workspace before jumping into the editor.
Saved as your default. Leave blank for \"Unknown Author\".
Update the name and author for this project.
Give your performance a name to get started.
Open an existing workspace or create a new project to get started.
Failed to convert Ableton + Apollo Project
Live Collaboration is disabled in Settings
Create a new project or open an existing .ame workspace. Alternatively, convert an Ableton, Apollo or UniPad project into an Amethyst workspace!
Failed to convert Ableton + Apollo Project
Open an existing workspace, continue where you left off, or start a new project.
Learn how to use Amethyst Studio.
Tune performance, audio, integrations, and experimental features for your setup.
To start editing MIDI patterns, please add one or more virtual devices inside the Layout View first...
Process project lights and show them during AutoPlay
Display white LEDs to indicate button presses
You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before closing?
This will permanently remove \"%1$s\" from the layout.
This will permanently remove \"%1$s\" from the layout.
